title: Industrial Office Chair Heavy Duty
description: Commercial-grade swivel chair. 300 lb capacity, reinforced base. Meets BIFMA standards.

title: Safety Glasses Clear
description: ANSI Z87.1 compliant. Anti-fog, scratch resistant. Wraparound design.

title: Work Gloves Leather
description: Driver-style leather gloves. Reinforced palm. Sizes S–XL.

title: Heavy-Duty Shelving Unit
description: Steel shelving 72" H, 48" W. 2000 lb capacity per level. Boltless assembly.

title: Cordless Drill 20V
description: Brushless motor, 1/2" chuck. Two batteries and charger included. Kit case.

title: LED Work Light 1000 Lumens
description: Rechargeable work light. Magnetic base, hook, 3 brightness levels.

title: Fire Extinguisher 5 lb ABC
description: UL listed 5 lb ABC dry chemical. Wall bracket included. For general use.

title: Tool Cabinet 26"
description: Steel tool cabinet with drawers and lock. Ball bearing slides. Red.

title: Hand Truck 400 lb
description: Aluminum hand truck. 400 lb capacity. Folding nose plate.

title: First Aid Kit 50-Piece
description: OSHA compliant first aid kit. Wall mount cabinet. Refillable.

title: Heavy-Duty Extension Cord 50 ft
description: 12-gauge, 3-prong. Indoor/outdoor. Yellow jacket.

title: Pallet Jack 5000 lb
description: Manual pallet jack. 5000 lb capacity. Steel forks 48" length.

title: Steel Toe Boots
description: ASTM F2413-11 M I/75 C/75. Waterproof, electrical hazard rated.

title: Wet/Dry Vac 10 Gallon
description: Shop vac 10 gal, 5 HP. Hose and attachments included. On wheels.

title: Lockout Tagout Kit
description: 6-piece LOTO kit. Padlock, tags, hasp. OSHA compliant.

title: Industrial Fan 20"
description: Heavy-duty floor fan. 3 speeds, tilting head. Metal guard.

title: Spill Kit 30 Gallon
description: Universal absorbent spill kit. Sorbents, PPE, disposal bag.

title: Cord Reel 50 ft
description: Retractable cord reel. 12/3 SJTO. Mounting bracket included.

title: Welding Helmet Auto-Darkening
description: Variable shade 9–13. Solar and battery. Grind mode.

title: Drum Dolly
description: 55-gallon drum dolly. Steel construction. 4 swivel casters.
